description: A lot of fraud and unauthorized transactions were captured. And helps minimized the losses of our company due to fraud transactions. Big thanks to Kount
author: Marimay A.
pros: Kount gives us the details and options to identify fraud, specially in online purchases. It's very risky for us merchant to approve all transactions. When I was a fraud agent way back 2014 we did manual fraud check that's very tragic and difficult. When Kount was introduced to us it makes our work a lot better and easier. All information was already given all we have to do is to study how Kount works and I was really impress about the details and features.
cons: So far working with kount is easy. I hope someday Kount will upgrade into more specific details specially under card name matching with bank record. I know it's really hard to do that because of the wide coverage of all the bank systems all over the world, but someday Kount will and can. :-)

description: It's been a very positive experience overall. Working with midigator has been extremely easy and whether it's the custom reports they share with me, or their customer support team getting back to us asap whenever we have a question - they cover all bases.
author: Javan R.
pros: The ability to find and fight chargebacks efficiently.
cons: That it took me so long to find in the first place.

description: We found that Kount was not as relevant in our industry as other fraud tools that are more geared toward the travel industry. I'm sure it works well for industries selling goods, however it didn't work well for us. Overall, our agents were at times confused, and most often not able to use Kount in their decision making process.
author: Robyn C.
pros: The ease of integration of the API was good. I also like that you can read where the device is, versus what IP they're using
cons: There's a lot of conflicting information in the results, thus not helping us in our decision for fraud. I've not been able to turn in on live onto the front end of our website, because it has falsely identified bookings as highly suspect of fraud, when they are past customers. We were being advised a credit card was issued on a U.S. bank when we knew the BIN number was a Canadian Bank issued card. We also had difficulty making a decision when the Persona was high and the safety rating was high as well. Our agents (end users) really struggled with using it to help make a decision about a fraudulent purchase. Sorry, not likely what you wanted to hear.

description: Midigator gives us access to all of the latest programs and services related to Chargebacks. They are always on top of the latest news and have deep insights into what the industry is doing and what is coming next. We have always had great service and communication with the team at Midigator.
author: Nick C.
pros: Integration with Midigator is easy and once it's established you have access to their full suite of services and reporting without any additional development effort.
cons: Honestly I don't have anything negative to say about the company or their services.

description: Kount's support team has been great as have anyone I've spoken to there. Very professional. Well written Magento extension.
author: Zach S.
pros: Kount has a highly customizable fraud rule set that includes things like credit card number (For blacklisting people who chargeback), geographic information (I.E. address attributes), email addresses, among others. Kount worked pretty much out of the box with our platform with limited modification to work with our payment gateway and limited modifications to our workflow. The web portal is also very easy to use, it creates few if any questions addressed to our tech team.
cons: I didn't have any problems with the software. So no real cons.

description: Excellent! The integration with Braintree is flawless and the cost per transaction is very low, when you compare to the cost of a chargeback (which can be hard to win).
author: Will F.
pros: It works. This software has helped save us hundreds of thousands of dollars. Our e commerce business was at a loss for what to do to screen out stollen cards.
cons: If you don't use Braintree (which we now use) as your merchant processor, Kount can be difficult to initially set up.

review_title: Very happy we started using Midigator when we did.
description: We have been using Midigator to help with chargeback issues during these difficult times. Logistics has proven to be difficult during Covid and I am happy we have tools like Midigator to help.
author: Aaron W.
pros: The platform itself is very easy to use and effective.
cons: I wish there was more flexibility with the pricing.

description: I am using Kount since 2015 and during this time all can say that software is with perfect device fingerprint. It is really important for the business which our company preform !
author: Georgi M.
pros: Easy to use , friendly interface, Strong fingerprint layer structure
cons: Some data storing which get lost after 14 days, if it's not reviewed.

author: Terry L.
pros: Quick integration, Customer UI (portal) is very intuitive, we can add our own user defined fields so that we can easily track data according to our business model.
cons: You cannot easily download all the linked order via a single click
author_profession: Sr. Manager, Payment Processing and Risk Management

review_title: Best Software used for large Organizations
description: Overall this is a wonderful program in which I've used in multiple large organizations
author: Sonia K.
pros: Love the user friendly interface, easy customization
cons: Pulling reports can be a bit difficult like any other software

author: Jason G.
pros: I love the ease of use of the dashboard, as well as the integrations with our CRM. What used to be a tedious task with marginal results has effectively turned into a money-making part of our business, fighting fraud and chargebacks. We've never been more profitable, and Midigator is a big reason.
cons: I guess the one thing that would be nice is to see a full review of each chargeback fought, but perhaps that's not even available. That's all I have!

description: With kount it's easier to get in a short period of time what our decline rates approve rates are etc. We've also been able to quickly isolate what regions fraud is coming from for certain of our websites.
author: Carla B.
pros: Using Kount as a fraud tools allows the analyst to do a fraud review with a minimum of clicks. The ability to customize and review rules reduced our fraud losses. The boost safety rating piece proved to be a valuable tool as well.
cons: The reporting aspect is not the greatest for our kind of business. our company is quite unique we have over 100 websites which is an overload in Kount when we attempt to run reports for all of our websites. However our Kount manger has been great in getting the Kount reporting team to pull those kinds of reports for us.

description: The reason why I highly recommend Midigator is actually because of the level of care and help provided by our contact, [SENSITIVE CONTENT] The software/portal is good to, but [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has driven our implementation no matter how difficult or complex it got. And she has spent so much time helping us, even when it's not always something that makes Midigator more money. That level of support is unmatched and is why we want to build this relationship with Midigator.
author: Bryan S.
pros: I like the dashboards and simplified layout that has sections for each of the types of things that Midigator handles for us. It helps keep a good grasp on how things are going and the impact that Midigator is having on our business.
cons: I don't like that the CB Rates shown are not the CB rates shown or calculated using the transaction counts in the processor portals. Instead our CRM transaction data is used and I'm not sure why since it's less accurate due to a time lag.

description: We had to leave Kount and switched to another solution.
author: Fabian B.
pros: It gave me decent amount information to make a more educated decision on questionable orders.
cons: It did not guarantee fraud orders. Also took a lot of my time to do further research online to decide if the order in question would be a fraud order. Very time consuming to decided what to do on questionable orders. Platform was very involved and overwhelming. Also included features that would be helpful but had to pay to add.

author: Abhinav S.
pros: This software is fantastic now. Before, I had to log in to two different software, but now both platforms are combined in one Mitigator software, which works great now.
cons: I don't find any issues till now. If any issue will contact with customer service

description: I process Refunds for the Merchants back to the Consumer. Overall the system/CRM works great.
author: julia D.
pros: Ease of use. Never times out. Easy to read. Has all available information!
cons: Our work requires a Chargeback option to choose from.

description: Overall it is software that gets the job done, but nothing spectacular.
author: Nicholas D.
pros: Software was easy to use once set up and getting around inside the software was simple and self explanatory.
cons: Expensive and reporting is a bit antiquated. It will tell you high level numbers but don't expect any analysis or deep dive.

author: Syed T.
pros: The web based access that make it easier for the user to operate it from anywhere without any hassle.
cons: Reporting seems to be very limited. There should some customization in the reporting required based on the merchant.

review_title: Help for a seemingly hopeless process
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I enjoy how easy Kount is to use, all of the information that I need is clearly laid out for my team and I to find and make quick decisions on orders in review.
cons: There are times when the software provides inaccurate information.

description: The team has been extremely helpful. I've always been assisted timely when I have encountered questions.
author: Laura L.
pros: Prevention alerts are really useful. If your company deals with a high volume of payments, you surely need Midigator to have a heads-up and resolve possible disputes.
cons: That I don't get alerts for Order Insights.

description: We were suffering from serious fraud attacks and the previous software was canceling good orders and letting through Fraud. With Kount, our chargebacks went down from 5-6% to under 1% within 6 months.
author: Dennis L.
pros: Kount is fully flexibly with extensive ability to collect statistics and continually analyze customer (and fraudster) behavior and dial in the protection rules. Each client has a dedicated account manager who is easy and fast to reach, truly making you feel like Kount has your back.
cons: Nothing at all. We are extremely happy with Kount.

description: I'm impressed of the powerful device fingerprint mechanism of Kount.
author: Svetoslav S.
pros: Kount has friendly and easy to use environment with powerful device fingerprint algorithm
cons: The platform is targeted more to sales business. As a part of gaming company we had some troubles to adjust Kount to our needs

author: Kristine M.
pros: It is easy to use. All the important details that I need to do my task is to already available on the first page and upon logging in.
cons: I need to re log in after a few minutes.

review_title: Kount has lowered our manual reviews significantly
author: Shelly G.
pros: Once you set up the rules, it is pretty simple to use. It eliminates a lot of manual review.
cons: Setting up the rules can be a little challenging. Since you don't know what you don't know, it may take some tweaking to get it just right. Once you see what is being held in review you can make your adjustments, but you may go through a period where too many orders are being held.

author: Corey V.
pros: Simple integration and responsive support
cons: You can't sign up to receive email notification only when there are pending warnings,
